title: Overlay’s
body:
![Texto alternativo](https://i.imgur.com/TTSvFJm.png)

**Overlay’s** is a texture pack that adds **dynamic overlays and smooth transitions between blocks**, such as dirt, moisture, cracks, and more.  
It enhances immersion without replacing the original block textures.  
Lightweight, visually impactful, and fully compatible with **Minecraft versions 1.14 through 1.26**, including visual support for selected mods.

***

## Latest Update v14

*   THANKS FOR 1M ♥️
* Compatible with newer versions of Minecraft 
* A problem with the Netherrak was fixes

***

## Requirements

*   **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)** (for versions without native CTM support)
*   **[Continuity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/continuity)** (modern alternative with Sodium and CTM support)
*   Continuity are recommended for the best visual experience

***

## Installation Guide

1.  Install **Optifine** or **Continuity**, depending on your setup
2.  Download the `.zip` file of **Overlay’s**
3.  Place it into your `/.minecraft/resourcepacks/` folder
4.  Activate it from the resource packs menu in-game
5.  Make sure **Overlay’s is placed at the top** if you're using other packs

***
